data.title: U.S. President Trump Considers Reducing Troops in NATO Countries
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has suggested the possibility of reducing American military personnel stationed in other NATO member countries. Bloomberg posted on X that this statement follows his recent announcement of a review of U.S. troop levels in Germany. The potential drawdown reflects ongoing discussions about the distribution of U.S. military forces in Europe and their strategic deployment within NATO. This move could have significant implications for U.S. relations with its NATO allies and the overall security dynamics in the region.

data.title: Solana's Carrot Protocol to Shut Down Following Drift Hack Impact
data.description: Carrot, a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol on the Solana blockchain, has announced its decision to cease operations. According to NS3.AI, the protocol cited the aftermath of the Drift hack as the primary reason for its closure, stating that continued operation is no longer feasible. Users have been advised to withdraw any remaining funds by May 14.

data.title: Bitcoin Rises to $76,420 Amid Market Cap Increase
data.description: The cryptocurrency market capitalization increased by 1.1% to reach $2.63 trillion on Thursday, with Bitcoin trading at $76,420 following a three-day decline. According to NS3.AI, data from SoSoValue indicated that U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $138 million on April 29. Meanwhile, the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) maintained interest rates between 3.50% and 3.75% in an 8-4 vote.

data.title: Apollo Secures $800 Million Private Credit Deal for GoodLife Group Investment
data.description: Apollo has secured approximately $800 million in private credit financing for its investment in the GoodLife Group, a Canadian health club operator. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the transaction, that the financing was provided by a group including Ares. This deal marks a significant investment in the fitness industry, highlighting the growing interest in health and wellness sectors. The GoodLife Group is known for its extensive network of health clubs across Canada, and this investment is expected to support its expansion and operational initiatives.

data.title: US President Trump: I don't care whether Powell stays at the Federal Reserve or not
data.description: US President Trump: I don't care whether Powell stays at the Fed, and I won't take any action. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Questions Feasibility of Strait of Hormuz Blockade
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump expressed skepticism about the possibility of a blockade in the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, Trump also stated that Iran is not generating any revenue from its oil.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Unconcerned About Powell's Future at Federal Reserve
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed indifference regarding Jerome Powell's continued role at the Federal Reserve. According to Odaily, Trump stated that he would not take any action concerning Powell's position.

data.title: Rivian's Q1 Revenue Exceeds Expectations at $1.38 Billion
data.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. (RIVN.O) reported its first-quarter revenue at $1.38 billion, surpassing the anticipated $1.36 billion. According to Jin10, the electric vehicle manufacturer continues to show strong performance in the market, exceeding analyst expectations for the quarter.

data.title: Trump said he might need to break the Iran ceasefire agreement.
data.description: US President Trump commented on the status of negotiations with Iran, but refused to rule out the possibility that hostilities might continue. When asked by reporters whether he was "eager to break the ceasefire," Trump stated that negotiations with Iran were problematic due to Tehran's "stubbornness" and because "nobody knows who their leader is." Returning to the initial question, he concluded, "I don't know if we need to do that"; but added at the end, "We might really need to." Trump also called blocking the Strait of Hormuz "unthinkable" and claimed that Washington had "destroyed" Iran's nuclear capabilities. (Jin Shi)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Iran's Nuclear Ambitions
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran is keen on reaching an agreement, emphasizing that the country must not acquire nuclear weapons. According to NS3.AI, Trump's remarks highlight ongoing international concerns regarding Iran's nuclear capabilities and the potential for diplomatic negotiations.

data.title: US President Trump: I don't know if we need to break the ceasefire agreement with Iran, maybe we will.
data.description: US President Trump: I don't know if we need to break the ceasefire agreement with Iran, but we might. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Considers Breaking Ceasefire Agreement with Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed uncertainty about the necessity of maintaining the ceasefire agreement with Iran. According to Odaily, he mentioned the possibility of breaking the agreement, although no definitive decision has been made.

data.title: US President Trump: Iran desires a deal, Iran cannot possess nuclear weapons
data.description: US President Trump: Iran is eager for a deal. Iran cannot possess nuclear weapons. (Jinshi)

data.title: Strategy CEO Phong Le Discusses STRC Investment and Dividend Comparison
data.description: Strategy CEO Phong Le recently disclosed his purchase of $250,000 worth of STRC last week. According to NS3.AI, Le highlighted the variable 11.5% annualized dividend of STRC, comparing it favorably to his 1.75% mortgage rate. He suggested that STRC might be suitable for individuals managing mortgage, utility, or car expenses. However, Strategy's STRC page notes that dividends can be suspended, the dividend rate may be adjusted, and principal repayment is not guaranteed.

data.title: Capital One Faces Class Action Over Credit Card Account Closures and Withheld Rewards
data.description: Capital One is currently facing a proposed class action lawsuit, which claims that the financial institution canceled credit card accounts and withheld rewards that customers had already earned. According to NS3.AI, the plaintiffs allege that Capital One did not provide explanations for the account closures. They are seeking damages and have requested a jury trial to address the issue.

data.title: Iranian Leaders Call for Foreign Minister's Dismissal Over Nuclear Negotiations
data.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf have reportedly urged the dismissal of Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi due to dissatisfaction with his management of nuclear negotiations. According to NS3.AI, the report was based on information from two sources cited by Iran International.

data.title: Expert Predicts Crypto Buying Opportunity Amid Investor Indifference
data.description: Trader Flood has highlighted a significant level of investor indifference toward cryptocurrencies, suggesting it presents a buying opportunity. According to NS3.AI, Flood compared the current market setup to those seen in 2019 and 2022, forecasting potential upside concentrated in select assets this year. He also anticipates a sharp re-evaluation of Bitcoin's price.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Adjusts GPT-5.4 to Reduce Goblin Mentions
data.description: OpenAI has announced changes to its GPT-5.4 model following an audit that revealed a significant increase in goblin mentions. According to NS3.AI, the Nerdy personality within the model was responsible for a 3,881% rise in references to goblins compared to the previous version, GPT-5.2. In response, OpenAI retired the Nerdy personality in March and introduced a Codex developer prompt instructing the model to avoid mentioning goblins or similar creatures unless they are clearly relevant to the context.

data.title: Bitcoin Enthusiasts Gather in Las Vegas Amid Market Stagnation
data.description: Each year, dedicated Bitcoin enthusiasts gather, donning orange cowboy hats, ties, and T-shirts, to express their optimism for $1 million Bitcoin valuations. According to Bloomberg, this year's event took place in Las Vegas, where the enthusiasm was palpable among attendees. However, despite the fervent chants and high spirits, the market remained unaffected by the gathering.

data.title: Walrus Introduces MemWal for AI Agents on Sui-Based Protocol
data.description: Walrus (WAL) has launched MemWal, a memory layer and software development kit aimed at enhancing AI agents on its Sui-based storage protocol. According to NS3.AI, the product is designed to ensure that agent memory is verifiable, portable, and shareable across different AI models. Mysten Labs product manager Abinhav Garg highlighted these features as key benefits of the new offering.
